title: phelipanche dalmatica
intro: Phelipanche dalmatica, also known as Dalmatian broomrape, is a parasitic plant species belonging to the Orobanchaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Phelipanche dalmatica include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion. Herbal preparations of Phelipanche dalmatica can be consumed as teas, infusions, or tinctures, although its availability and usage may vary due to its rarity and potential toxicity.
